name: Creades AB
summary: Creades AB is a private equity and venture capital investment firm. The firm typically invests in small and medium-sized public and private companies. It focuses on Swedish companies. The firm seeks to invest between SEK100 ($15.51 million) and  SEK300 million ($46.53 million). The firm prefers to take a seat on the board of directors of its portfolio companies and is not limited to any specific industry. The firm uses personal and balance sheet capital for making investments. Creades AB was founded in 2011 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
